text.title: langchain-production-patterns Failure Modes
text.summary: Four hardening antipatterns that turn safety nets into bugs: silent dep upgrades, retry storms, fallback masking, batch order break.

antipattern.symptom: Chain returns subtly different outputs the day after `pip install -U` runs in CI.
antipattern.root-cause: requirements.txt has floating versions; LangChain bumped minor; default parser changed.
antipattern.fix: Switch to exact-hash pinning (`pip-tools` / `uv lock`); restore via CI from lockfile, never `pip install -U` outside an explicit upgrade PR.
antipattern.detector: Diff lockfile across commits; any LangChain version bump without a corresponding PR description is a flag.

antipattern.symptom: One provider's 5xx tornado triggers 50 retries per request × 1000 RPS = $$$ + DoS yourself.
antipattern.root-cause: Retry wrapped around the whole chain without exponential backoff, jitter, or max-attempt cap.
antipattern.fix: retry.max_attempts ≤5 with exponential backoff + jitter; circuit-breaker layer above that.
antipattern.detector: Spike retry count metric to confirm cap holds; load-test with a forced 5xx.

antipattern.symptom: Fallback works so well you do not realise the primary is dead for a week.
antipattern.root-cause: with_fallbacks succeeds silently; no alert wired on fallback hit rate.
antipattern.fix: Emit a metric on fallback path; alert when fallback rate >5% over 1h.
antipattern.detector: Force-fail primary in staging; verify alert fires.

antipattern.symptom: Batch outputs come back in wrong order after a retry.
antipattern.root-cause: chain.batch reorders on partial failure; reorder bug bites only with retries.
antipattern.fix: Pass `return_exceptions=True` and explicitly correlate results by input index, never by order.
antipattern.detector: Inject a forced fail on item 3 of a 10-batch; verify correlation, not order.
